subject: math
activity_templates: A 2nd-grade two-digit subtraction worksheet. 8 subtraction problems in stacked column form (e.g. '56 - 24 = __') with space for regrouping. Header reads 'Double-Digit Subtraction'. {{character}} holds a pencil in the corner.
A 2-digit subtraction-with-regrouping worksheet. 6 problems in column form with clear tens/ones columns and a reference chart at the top showing how to regroup. {{character}} points to the reference.
A subtraction word-problem worksheet with 4 kid-friendly two-digit subtraction word problems, each with workspace and answer line. {{character}} sits beside the problems thinking.
A missing-number subtraction worksheet. 8 problems like '34 - __ = 22' or '__ - 15 = 40' laid out in a 2x4 grid. {{character}} scratches head in the corner.
